dialog.stepLabel: Yingzhu: "Thank you for your help. Please take this: It’s a small toke..."

items.speaker: Yingzhu
items.text: Thank you for your help. Please take this: It’s a small token of our appreciation.

items.speaker: Yingzhu
items.text: This is a commemorative issue of “Jinzhou: A Closer Look”. Our magazine has been officially recognized by Jinzhou Institute as a teaching resource.

items.speaker: Xingzhu
items.text: Look, we put your name on the acknowledgement page.

items.speaker: Xingzhu
items.text: “We want to thank {PlayerName} for greatly assisting us in our journey for knowledge.”

items.speaker: Yingzhu
items.text: No, we are the ones who owe you our gratitude!

items.speaker: Yingzhu
items.text: Now “Jinzhou: A Closer Look” is on the right track, which can be considered a satisfactory result.

items.speaker: Yingzhu
items.text: However, when we write other publications, we may still need your help.

items.speaker: Xingzhu
items.text: Hopefully, we will get the chance to continue collaborating, {PlayerName}!
